summarize.line4: Include the main points in bullet format
summarize.line5: Preserve key statistics, dates, and figures
summarize.line6: Note the author's main argument or conclusion
summarize.line7: Highlight any action items or next steps
summarize.line8: Include relevant quotes if they capture key ideas

summarizeArticle.line3: Start with a one-sentence TL;DR that captures the main point
summarizeArticle.line4: List the key arguments or claims made by the author
summarizeArticle.line5: Note any data, statistics, or evidence cited
summarizeArticle.line6: Identify the author's perspective or potential bias
summarizeArticle.line7: Highlight any actionable takeaways for the reader
summarizeArticle.line8: Rate the article's depth and quality (superficial, adequate, thorough)

summarizeMeeting.line2: List attendees and their roles if mentioned

summarizeMeeting.line4: List all decisions that were made, clearly stated
summarizeMeeting.line5: Extract action items in format: [Owner] — task — deadline
summarizeMeeting.line6: Note any open questions or issues that need follow-up
summarizeMeeting.line7: Highlight risks or blockers that were raised
summarizeMeeting.line8: Include the next meeting date or next steps agreed upon

summarizeVideo.line3: Provide timestamps for each major topic or segment
summarizeVideo.line4: List the key points made in each segment
summarizeVideo.line5: Include any notable quotes or memorable moments
summarizeVideo.line6: Note any resources, links, or references mentioned
summarizeVideo.line7: Identify the main takeaway or call to action
summarizeVideo.line8: Rate the content quality and who would benefit most from watching

summarizeBook.line3: Start with the book's central thesis or argument in 2-3 sentences
summarizeBook.line4: Provide a chapter-by-chapter or section-by-section breakdown
summarizeBook.line5: Identify the major themes and how they develop throughout the book
summarizeBook.line6: Include the most impactful quotes with page/chapter references
summarizeBook.line7: Note the author's credentials and perspective that shaped the work
summarizeBook.line8: List the most practical or actionable ideas from the book
summarizeBook.line9: Compare with similar books in the genre: how does it stand out?
summarizeBook.line10: Give a final rating and who should read this book

summarizeResearch.line1: Summarize the following research paper in {{field}}
summarizeResearch.line3: State the research question and hypothesis clearly
summarizeResearch.line5: List the key findings and whether they support the hypothesis
summarizeResearch.line6: Note the sample size and statistical significance
summarizeResearch.line7: Identify the main limitations acknowledged by the authors
summarizeResearch.line8: Explain the practical implications: what does this mean for the field?
summarizeResearch.line9: List the most important citations for further reading
summarizeResearch.line10: Assess the paper's contribution: incremental, significant, or groundbreaking?
